news.headline: WWII vets return to Pacific for 80th anniv. of Battle of Iwo Jima, escorted by Eagle Society & Iwo Jima Assoc; 7 vets.
news.summary: The Eagle Society in Nashville, Tennessee, announced on March 21, 2025, that they will be assisting the Iwo Jima Association of America in taking seven World War II veterans back to the Pacific battlefields to mark the 80th anniversary of the Battle of Iwo Jima. The veterans, who will be escorted, are being supported by the organization in this significant commemoration event.

news.headline: Investors with losses exceeding $50,000 in Ready Capital urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have suffered losses of over $50,000 in Ready Capital to reach out to him directly. If losses were experienced between November 7, 2024, and March of the same year, investors are encouraged to discuss their options with Wilson.

The report covers various product categories including Basic Life Support (such as CRP and IV Training), Respiratory, Dental, Obstetric, and Surgical task trainers. It delves into applications within Patient Care and Medical Training. The study provides valuable information on market size, share, forecasts, and trends analysis.

news.headline: King Charles to make ‘secret offer’ to Donald Trump during State visit - after Starmer hand-delivered letter from King - Sun.

J.P. Morgan upgrades Freeport-McMoRan to Overweight, raising price forecast to $52 from $48 due to tariff-related factors and supply constraints. Premium pricing predicted for U.S.-based operations amid potential national security risk. Review ongoing, outcome expected by November 22.
news.summary: A recent upgrade by J.P. Morgan analyst Bill Peterson saw Freeport-McMoRan, Inc. (NYSE:FCX) jump from a Neutral to Overweight rating, with a revised price forecast of $52, up from $48. This positive outlook is driven by tariff-related factors expected to maintain high pricing for FCX's U.S. operations. Long-term supply constraints are also anticipated to contribute to a robust pricing environment industry-wide. Following President Trump's announcement on February 25 regarding a national security risk assessment for U.S. copper imports, COMEX copper has consistently held a premium of around 10% over LME prices. The assessment process is ongoing, with a final decision slated for November 22. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Wirex wins Best Digital Banking Platform award at 2025 FinTech Breakthrough Awards, recognizing their innovative financial solutions.
news.summary: In London on March 21, 2025, Wirex, a prominent Web3 money application, received the Best Digital Banking Platform award at the 2025 FinTech Breakthrough Awards. This accolade showcases Wirex's dedication to providing straightforward, secure, and inventive financial services to millions of users.

news.headline: Quatrro Business Support Services is Great Place to Work® Certified for 4 years, offering various services to SMBs and the mid-market.

news.headline: Celebrating 60 years of Grateful Dead with art exhibition in Vegas. Features works by artists and photographers over six weekends, with special "Bicycle Day" event on April 19.
news.summary: Animazing Gallery will showcase artworks by artists and photographers connected to the Grateful Dead, with appearances by the artists during the six-weekend Sphere Shows. A special event on "Bicycle Day" (April 19) will commemorate the psychedelic revolution, featuring distinctive blotter art. The gallery, located in Las Vegas, will host this exhibition starting in March.

news.headline: SFSU Alumna Neda Nobari expands STEM scholarship program for first-gen low-income students in honor of Maryam Mirzakhani.
news.summary: Celebrating the legacy of the esteemed Maryam Mirzakhani, a trailblazing mathematician from Iran and the inaugural female recipient of the prestigious Fields Medal, philanthropist Neda Nobari has established scholarships aimed at fostering diversity in STEM fields. The scholarships are designated for exceptional first-generation, low-income students with a passion for STEM disciplines. This initiative was announced in Los Angeles on March 21, 2025.

news.headline: Star Catcher demonstrates space power beaming at EverBank Stadium, paves way for in-space energy grid construction.
news.summary: In a significant step towards developing the initial in-space energy network for satellites, Star Catcher Industries, Inc. has achieved a major milestone. Based in Jacksonville, Florida, the groundbreaking company specializes in space-to-space power beaming. The successful test, conducted on March 21, 2025, marks a pivotal moment as Star Catcher becomes the first to accomplish this feat. This advancement underscores their leadership in the sector and their commitment to revolutionizing satellite technology.

news.headline: Goodwill Industries of the Chesapeake invests in Jessup with new store and donation center, creating jobs and supporting local growth.

The new establishment is expected to bring a significant number of job opportunities to the region while also enhancing sustainability efforts and fostering local economic growth. This move underscores Goodwill Industries' commitment to supporting communities and expanding its reach to provide essential services.

news.summary: A medical organization in Fort Myers, Florida, known as FCS, is actively backing the development of future oncologists by taking a prominent part in the 2025 Florida Society of Clinical Oncology (FLASCO) Fellows & Residents Training.

news.headline: Inventor from Daytona Beach invents TACTIC wireless charger for cell phones, allows charging while on the move.
news.summary: Inventor from Daytona Beach, Fla., shared about the innovative TACTIC charger on March 21, 2025 in Pittsburgh. The inventor aimed to address the inconvenience of stationary charging by creating a solution that enables users to charge their phones while moving freely in the room. The TACTIC charger ensures users can continue using their phones without interruption while they are being charged wirelessly. This invention is set to revolutionize the way people power their devices, with the potential to significantly impact the market.

IT Concepts becomes Kentro, focusing on mission-driven digital solutions for the federal government.
news.summary: A prominent provider of digital services for the federal government, IT Concepts, Inc., has officially rebranded as Kentro (formerly known as IT Concepts, Inc. DBA Kentro). AI crucial in HCM, ISG predicts two-thirds of enterprises to require AI by 2027.
news.summary: A recent report by ISG predicts that by 2027, around 66% of enterprises will require AI-enabled capabilities for their Human Capital Management (HCM) and employee engagement strategies. This shift highlights the increasing importance of AI in modern workforce management, signaling a significant evolution in how businesses approach these areas. The use of AI is expected to become integral in enhancing HCM practices and fostering better employee engagement, as organizations strive to leverage technological advancements for improved efficiency and productivity.

news.headline: Analysts reduced forecasts for Accenture after Q2 results. Earnings per share were $2.82 and sales were $16.66 billion.
news.summary: Accenture Plc (NYSE:ACN) announced positive second-quarter results, surpassing expectations. The company reported earnings of $2.82 per share for the quarter ending in 2025, slightly higher than the anticipated $2.81. Their sales for the period reached $16.66 billion, nearly matching the consensus of $16.62 billion and the management's forecast range of $16.2 billion to $16.8 billion. The company highlighted strong client trust and confidence, with 32 clients showing substantial quarterly bookings.

news.headline: SEC dropped XRP case, ending 4-year litigation against Ripple for alleged $1.3B unregistered securities offering in 2020. XRP token unable to stay above $2.5 after 11% rally, fell 6.3%. Market already expected SEC outcome. XRP may rally 75% after lawsuit's end.
news.summary: The United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has dropped its legal action against Ripple, ending a four-year litigation against the blockchain developer for an alleged $1.3 billion unregistered securities offering in 2020. Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse revealed this victory on March 19. Analysts believe the market had already priced in this event since President Trump's election, resulting in only an 11% rally for XRP token post-announcement. Despite some technical chart patterns indicating a potential 75% rally for XRP post-lawsuit, the token is struggling to stay above the $2.5 mark and has fallen over 6.3% since the announcement. The market sentiment and overall macro environment are not favorable for XRP, although the SEC's decision will have a positive impact on the market in the long term due to changing narratives and expectations of a more crypto-friendly SEC.

news.headline: Global smart biomaterials market is projected to reach $50.5 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 12.3% from 2024. Key drivers include investments in drug delivery systems and regenerative medicine. Industry leaders are focusing on R&D to enhance applications in tissue engineering and medical devices.
news.summary: The global smart biomaterials market is experiencing rapid growth, with a value of US$14.5 billion in 2023 and projected to reach US$50.5 billion by 2034, at a CAGR of 12.3%. Key factors driving this expansion include investments in drug delivery systems, advancements in regenerative medicine, and the rise in chronic diseases. Industry leaders like Bonalive Biomaterials Ltd., Evonik Industries AG, and Medtronic are focusing on R&D to develop 3D printable biomaterials for tissue engineering, wound healing, and medical devices. Smart biomaterials offer dynamic functionality in applications like drug delivery, tissue engineering, implants, and wound healing, transforming healthcare by improving patient outcomes and reducing complications. Future trends include self-healing biomaterials, AI-powered material informatics, bioelectronics integration, and green chemistry-based biomaterials for eco-conscious medical applications. The market is witnessing a surge in investment in drug delivery systems to meet the demand for controlled drug release and encapsulation solutions. Personalized regenerative medicines developed from bioactive materials are gaining popularity for their targeted therapy delivery. Smart biomaterials are positioned to revolutionize healthcare, as they enable predictive, personalized care as the sector moves away from reactive approaches.

news.headline: Tuya Smart and DeepSeek are transforming AI into emotional companions, reshaping smart homes. March 21, 2025. TUYA on NYSE & HKEX.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, Tuya Smart, a leading AI cloud platform service provider, is revolutionizing the application of AI in smart homes. Listed on NYSE as TUYA and HKEX as 2391, the company is transforming technology into an emotionally intuitive ally within homes. Their innovative approach aims to enhance the home experience for individuals.

news.headline: Lennox (NYSE: LII) declares $1.15 quarterly dividend per share, payable on May 15, 2025, to stockholders of record by April 30, 2025.
news.summary: Dallas, TX - On March 21, 2025, the Board of Directors of Lennox (NYSE: LII) sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $1.15 for each share of common stock. This dividend will be disbursed on May 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of April 30, 2025. Lennox, a prominent player in energy-efficient solutions, continues to provide innovative services in the industry.

news.headline: Fed's Williams: I closely watch fiscal policy as it relates to economy and monetary policy.
Kanzhun's stock up 10% on solid earnings; net profit up 42.6% to 1.57 billion yuan, monthly active users grew 25.3% to 53 million.
news.summary: Kanzhun Ltd., the operator of China's largest online recruitment platform Boss Zhipin, reported significant growth in its financial performance. The company's annual revenue increased by 23.6% year-on-year to 7.36 billion yuan ($1.02 billion) and its net profit surged by 42.6% to 1.57 billion yuan. Kanzhun's monthly active users also grew by 25.3% to 53 million. The company ended the year with 14.7 billion yuan in cash and short-term investments. The overall positive performance reflects the potential opportunities in the recruitment industry as more people enter the workforce and companies show signs of ramping up recruitment activities. However, challenges remain, and the industry is expected to truly thrive once the broader economy picks up and companies increase their hiring efforts. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nike Inc exceeded earnings and revenue expectations in Q3 fiscal 2025, with revenue hitting $11.27 billion and earnings at 54 cents per share. Analysts upgraded their forecasts.
news.summary: Nike Inc (NYSE:NKE) exceeded expectations in its fiscal 2025 third-quarter financial report, with revenue reaching $11.27 billion, surpassing analyst projections of $11.01 billion. The company also reported earnings of 54 cents per share for the quarter, exceeding analyst estimates of 28 cents per share. Nike's President and CEO, Elliott Hill, expressed confidence in the company's progress in achieving its strategic goals, stating, "The progress we made against the ‘Win Now' strategic priorities we committed to 90 days ago reinforces my confidence that we are on the right path." This positive performance demonstrates the impact Nike has had in the market during this quarter. Detailed coverage is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Better Choice Company gets approval to acquire SRx Health Solutions & related proposals at special meeting on March 21, 2025.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on March 21, 2025, Better Choice Company, Inc. (NYSE American: BTTR), a leading pet health and wellness company, received shareholder approval for key proposals during a special meeting. The approved proposals were voted on during the March 21, 2025 meeting.

news.headline: Tata Communications launches Vayu Cloud fabric, revolutionizing cloud for intelligent enterprises.
news.summary: Tata Communications, a major global communications technology company and a key player in private Cloud services, unveiled Tata Communications Vayu on March 21, 2025 in Mumbai, India. The launch marks a significant step in the company's strategy, with Tata Communications' stock trading on the National Stock Exchange as TATACOMM and on the Bombay Stock Exchange as 500483. Tata Communications Vayu represents the latest innovation in Cloud technology, aimed at transforming Cloud fabric for improved services.

news.headline: NYC surgeon Jayme Locke awarded Excellence in Kidney Transplantation by NKF. Dr. Locke is VP of Medical Development at United Therapeutics.
news.summary: On March 21, 2025, in New York, the National Kidney Foundation presented Dr. Jayme Locke with the award. Dr. Locke holds multiple roles including Vice President of Medical Development for Xenotransplantation at United Therapeutics, Adjunct Professor of Surgery at NYU Langone Health, and Member of the American Society of Transplant Surgeons.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices, including Bitcoin and Ethereum, dropped 2.4% due to 'triple witching', with BTC falling below $84,000 and ETH at $1,948.93.
news.summary: In recent market activity, the price of cryptocurrency has experienced a decrease along with other major coins due to anticipation of heightened market volatility. At this time, the value of has decreased by 2.4% from the previous day's value, falling below $84,000. Following suit, has also dropped by 2.4%, now being traded at $1,948.93 per coin based on data from CoinGecko. It is worth noting that the value of hasn't been this low since November.

news.headline: FedEx's Q3 earnings below expectations. Quarterly revenue $22.2B (+$0.5B YoY), EPS $4.51 (+$0.04 miss). Analysts lower forecasts.
news.summary: FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) released its third-quarter results, reporting earnings of $4.51 per share, missing the analyst consensus of $4.54. Quarterly revenue stood at $22.2 billion, surpassing the estimated $21.89 billion and showing growth from $21.7 billion in the same period last year. CEO Raj Subramaniam acknowledged the challenging operational landscape, citing a successful navigation through obstacles like a condensed peak season and severe weather conditions. However, due to uncertainties regarding retirement plans, the company refrained from offering an outlook on fiscal 2025 earnings per share or effective tax rate. For further details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TESCO introduces T3 Turbo Meter Tester, a quicker way to test meters in the field. Paired with 6330 Meter Site Analyzer for comprehensive diagnostics.
news.summary: The T3, in conjunction with the 6330 Meter Site Analyzer, offers a comprehensive solution for field testing, guaranteeing thorough meter and site diagnostics for various situations. Recently in Bristol, Pennsylvania on March 21, 2025, utilities encountered increasing difficulties in meter testing and site diagnostics.

news.headline: Report on United States Salt Industry: Review of 2019-2024 with forecasts till 2029 covering supply/demand, trade stats, production, and consumption.
news.summary: A report on the Salt Market in the USA for the period 2019-2024 has been recently published and is available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. It provides comprehensive insights into the market, offering an analysis of the past years and forecasts for 2025 to 2029. The report covers various aspects such as supply and demand dynamics, pricing trends, and the influence on downstream industries. Apart from detailed tables and figures, the report also includes in-depth textual content, making it a valuable resource for those interested in the industry.
